description.description: Detailed description of the teacup's features and craftsmanship

price.description: Price of the teacup in USD

glaze_type.description: Type of glaze used (e.g., celadon, blue and white, famille rose)

capacity_ml.description: Capacity of the teacup in milliliters

artisan.description: Name of the artisan who crafted the teacup

is_featured.description: Whether this teacup is featured on the homepage

in_stock.description: Whether the teacup is currently available
